text: {\fad(0,50)}Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
raising our battle cry.
If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
ring out.
We were able to escape from the set course
along the boundary between sky and sea.
Now we're rowing our way
to a hidden adventure at the dark bottom of the sea.
Doesn't it sound fun just thinking about it?
Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
raising our battle cry.
If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
ring out.
{\fad(0,50)}That feeling we had when we set sail
is something I'll never forget.
Because of that
nothing will be able to scare me...
Now, as the trip approaches, our racing heartbeats
engrave a rhythm of adventure in our shy hearts.
{\fad(0,50)}Get all the treasures
while laughing out loud.
Give them all out at a big party
{\fad(50,50)}making a splash...
Fill your empty heart with dreams.
Spread your wings.
If you color your heart with the blowing wind
you will move on.
Get all the treasures
while laughing out loud.
Give them all out at a big party
making a splash...
{\fad(1500,2000)}The Fearsome Ability of the Shadow Fruit!\NThe Ultimate Number 900!

name: Franky
text: It's not over!

name: Franky
text: Despite cutting him, he's still a zombie.

name: Franky
text: He'll keep getting up!

name: Spider
text: You...!

name: Spider
text: Wait a sec... I've seen you before...

name: Brook
text: Worry not.

name: Brook
text: I've finished him off already.

name: Franky
text: Finished?

name: Brook
text: These zombies have a weak point.

name: Franky
text: What is that?!

name: Brook
text: That's the zombie's soul.

name: Franky
text: Soul?

name: Franky
text: It's coming out right before our eyes!

name: Brook
text: Now, return to your master!

name: Mouse
text: Commander Tararan!

name: Mouse
text: The commander was defeated!

name: Franky
text: He completely stopped moving.

name: Franky
text: What did you do?!

name: Brook
text: Purification.

name: Mouse
text: Look!

name: Mouse
text: There's no doubt, he is the "Humming One".

name: Mouse
text: He's the man who caused a ruckus in Thriller Bark five years ago.

name: Mouse
text: Inform master!

name: Brook
text: This spider's web is indeed strong against physical force, but still weak to fire.

name: Franky
text: You're right!

name: Franky
text: It melted!

name: Franky
text: Straw Hat and the others were abducted.

name: Franky
text: It seems you know quite a lot about this island.

name: Brook
text: Yes.

name: Brook
text: However, I'm not quite sure how to put this.

name: Brook
text: The fact that they've been captured means there is a strong possibility it may already be too late.

name: Franky
text: What?!

name: Franky
text: Too late?!

name: Brook
text: P-Please don't get mad at me.

name: Brook
text: Let's keep a straight face!

name: Brook
text: Even though as a skeleton, I don't have a face!

name: Brook
text: Skull joke!

name: Robin
text: Stop it, he's already dead.

name: Brook
text: Anyway,

name: Brook
text: Stop joking and listen to me.

name: Robin
text: Stop it, he's already dead.

name: Brook
text: It is as I told you on the ship, when my ship's rudder failed,

name: Brook
text: I began wandering the sea alone decades ago...

name: Brook
text: I thought of escaping this evil sea, but with the rudder broken I was just a puppet of the sea current.

name: Brook
text: That was more than five years ago.

name: Brook
text: And just like you now, I eventually was lead to Thriller Bark.

name: Brook
text: I wanted to leave the Florian Triangle no matter what.

name: Brook
text: Hoping that there might be parts to fix the rudder on the island, I investigated.

name: Brook
text: When I entered, I found nothing but zombies and monsters in the way.

name: Brook
text: Before long I was captured and brought to this building.

name: Brook
text: Inside I saw a combat dancer who was caught earlier and a patched corpse which they called a marionette.

name: Brook
text: Afterwards, a terrifying and huge man appeared, and...!

name: Brook
text: He tore the man's shadow from the floor!

name: Brook
text: He cut it off!

name: Franky
text: His shadow was cut off?

name: Brook
text: I thought my eyes were deceiving me... even though...

name: Brook
text: I don't have any eyes.

name: Franky
text: Stop joking or I'll kick your ass!

name: Robin
text: I don't mind if you do.

name: Brook
text: I was to have the same fate before long.

name: Brook
text: The one whose shadow was taken collapsed where he stood.

name: Brook
text: On the other hand, his severed shadow was pressed inside the unmoving body of the marionette.

name: Brook
text: I didn't think that was possible...

name: Brook
text: How he did it, I'm unsure...

name: Brook
text: But, the marionette corpse just...

name: Brook
text: Started moving on its own!

name: Robin
text: What do you mean?

name: Brook
text: A shadow is another soul that goes and moves along with you anywhere.

name: Brook
text: It follows you from birth to death.

name: Brook
text: It's a soul that will never leave you, that will always obey and follow you.

name: Brook
text: The man that seizes these, and has them obey his will is...

name: Brook
text: The Royal Warlord of the Sea, Gekko Moriah!

name: Brook
text: The user of the Shadow Fruit.

name: Franky
text: A devil fruit, huh?

name: Brook
text: As long as there's a corpse, he can use a shadow to bring forth a zombie.

name: Brook
text: The problem is that the genius surgeon who creates these tough creatures, Doctor Hogback... has friends.

name: Brook
text: In some cases, he gets parts from different graveyards...

name: Brook
text: Using the corpses of legendary warriors to revive them.

name: Brook
text: Moreover, he has an immense amount of enumerated marionettes still stored in a freezer in his lab.

name: Robin
text: Dr. Hogback...

name: Robin
text: So that famous doctor came to this place after the incident of his disappearance to help a pirate.

name: Franky
text: Then, the zombies' bodies can move, so it's not like they've been resurrected.

name: Brook
text: Correct.

name: Brook
text: The shadow holds both the personality and fighting skills of its owner.

name: Brook
text: The physical strength of the marionette is limited by the power of it's body.

name: Brook
text: When both strong shadow and body are merged, the result is an even more powerful zombie.

name: Brook
text: That is why Moriah so eagerly desires the shadows of bounty heads.

name: Franky
text: I see.

name: Franky
text: They were after us from the start.

name: Robin
text: So that's the whole story of Thriller Bark.

name: Robin
text: To Moriah, the zombie's most important characteristic might be obedience.

name: Robin
text: The stronger the warrior the harder it must be to make it listen.

name: Brook
text: True... they receive the same fighting spirit and skill as their owner.

name: Brook
text: The strong ones are set adrift at sea after they lose consciousness.

name: Franky
text: Then, they...!

name: Franky
text: This is bad.

name: Brook
text: They're safe yet.

name: Brook
text: We have time.

name: Brook
text: Right now I will tell you the best plan we have.

name: Brook
text: So please, trust me and do as I say.

name: Franky
text: Trust you?!

name: Brook
text: Skull Shock!

name: Brook
text: I haven't had a conversation like this in decades! It's so fun!

name: Robin
text: We're listening, so tell us quickly.

name: Brook
text: Okay...

name: Zombies
text: Master!

name: Zombies
text: The Three Mysterious Persons have arrived!

name: Moria
text: That was quick. Enter.

name: Zombies
text: Please, come inside.

name: Moria
text: You finally came.

name: Moria
text: Make me the Pirate King.

name: All
text: Very soon.

name: Luffy
text: You're no Pirate King!

name: Luffy
text: The Pirate King will be...

name: Luffy
text: Me!

name: Luffy
text: Hey! Untie this string you giant leek!

name: Luffy
text: Usopp, Nami, Chopper, Sanji, Zoro... Give them all back!

name: Luffy
text: Where did you take them, leek?!

name: Hogback
text: What a splendidly strong man.

name: Hogback
text: So this is Straw Hat Luffy.

name: Moria
text: Hey, Straw Hat Luffy.

name: Moria
text: You mentioned many names.

name: Moria
text: We've only captured three of you so far.

name: Moria
text: The Pirate Hunter Zoro and a blond guy with no wanted poster.

name: Luffy
text: Could that blond guy be Sanji...?

name: Usopp
text: What?!

name: Usopp
text: Hey, it seems Zoro and Sanji also got caught.

name: Chopper
text: No way, and Luffy was also caught!

name: Nami
text: H-How come that monstrous trio got caught so easily?!

name: Usopp
text: I don't know who these guys are, but they're definitely bad news!

name: Hogback
text: By the way, what happened with those three, Perona?

name: Hogback
text: The Risky Brothers were supposed to deliver them...

name: Perona
text: They didn't bring them to Kumashi.

name: Perona
text: Didn't they escape while they were being delivered?

name: Usopp
text: They're talking about us.

name: Usopp
text: Don't say it. You... Don't say it!

name: Perona
text: I told you not to open your mouth!

name: Absalom
text: You're too strict with Kumashi...

name: Absalom
text: Way too strict.

name: Absalom
text: Anyways, I was trying to get a hold of my bride when those three...

name: Absalom
text: Ran into your garden and caused a disturbance.

name: Absalom
text: Hey, wait a second.

name: Absalom
text: That means... Hogback...!

name: Absalom
text: Bastard, do you mean that one of you laid a hand on my bride?!

name: Absalom
text: So that's what happened before!

name: Cindry
text: Your bride is not coming.

name: Absalom
text: What was that, Cindry!?

name: Hogback
text: Hey! Hey! Cindry-chan, you're making it worse!

name: Hogback
text: And why did you step out in front of me?

name: Cindry
text: Yours won't be coming either.

name: Hogback
text: What a low blow! Where did that come from?!

name: Moria
text: Stop! Stop!

name: Moria
text: Stop this pointless discussion.

name: Moria
text: If some pirates got away, then you guys can do something about it later.

name: Moria
text: I gathered you here to celebrate the creation of a great fighting asset.

name: Zombies
text: Who is that guy!?

name: Zombies
text: Master, that pirate bit the cage apart to escape!

name: Moria
text: Bit the cage!

name: Luffy
text: What're you gonna do to catch me now?!

name: Hogback
text: What a promising man!

name: Perona
text: Wait, Absalom, we're inside a room.

name: Perona
text: I'll stop him.

name: Luffy
text: Like you'd catch me, idiot!

name: Perona
text: {\fad(150,150)}Negative Hollow!

name: Luffy
text: If I were to be reborn, I want to become a sea slug...

name: Absalom
text: The man who just said he wanted to be Pirate King now wants to be a sea slug...

name: Absalom
text: Atrocious...

name: Moria
text: Turn the light on!

name: Luffy
text: What're you doing, damn it!

name: Luffy
text: You'll regret this!

name: Luffy
text: W-What's that?!

name: Luffy
text: My shadow...!

name: Moria
text: I finally have it!

name: Moria
text: The 300 million fighting power!

name: Moria
text: With this, the Ultimate Special Zombie can be created!

name: Franky
text: Go back to the ship?

name: Franky
text: To the Sunny?

name: Brook
text: Correct.

name: Brook
text: The worst case scenario is that your friends have been captured and their shadows have been stolen.

name: Brook
text: However, having their shadow stolen isn't going to kill them.

name: Brook
text: Take a look at what happened to me!

name: Brook
text: Ah, I died!

name: Franky
text: That's a different story!

name: Franky
text: Anyway...

name: Franky
text: In short, even if they got their shadow stolen, they won't die.

name: Brook
text: That's right.

name: Brook
text: However, the moment their shadows are taken, they become vulnerable as they lose consciousness.

name: Brook
text: And won't wake up for two days.

name: Brook
text: During this time they put those who are strong into boats and cast them off from Thriller Bark.

name: Brook
text: I've said this before but, do you know why they do that?

name: Robin
text: So that the victims won't attempt to return to the island and reclaim their shadows, right?

name: Brook
text: Precisely.

name: Franky
text: Then, why not just kill them while they're unconscious?

name: Brook
text: They cannot.

name: Brook
text: This is very important, so listen carefully.

name: Brook
text: First of all...

name: Brook
text: Although the body and the shadow may be separated, they're part of one being.

name: Brook
text: If the body dies, then the shadow is doomed as well.

name: Brook
text: In other words, the moment that happens, the zombie will also perish.

name: Brook
text: This means trouble for the enemy, so they make sure to keep the body alive.

name: Brook
text: Which means that, even if your friends have been stripped off their shadows...

name: Brook
text: They are surely alive and are being taken back to the ship.

name: Brook
text: That's why...!

name: Brook
text: If you two become victims as well, this will turn into the worst case scenario!

name: Brook
text: Everyone would've lost their shadows and will be left to wander the sea.

name: Brook
text: But something can still be done. If we wake up your friends...

name: Brook
text: We'll have one chance to figure out how to recover the stolen shadows.

name: Brook
text: Did you get all that?

name: Franky
text: I see.

name: Franky
text: That makes sense.

name: Brook
text: Take this, you two.

name: Robin
text: What is it?

name: Brook
text: The zombies' weakness.

name: Brook
text: It's effectiveness against the Spider Monkey is proof!

name: Franky
text: Weakness?

name: Franky
text: What is this?

name: Brook
text: Salt.

name: Franky
text: Salt?

name: Franky
text: So it's kinda like we're defeating some evil being by purifying it?

name: Brook
text: Well, you could say that.

name: Brook
text: The zombies are originally animated by the power of the devil fruit.

name: Brook
text: Just as the sea nullifies the abilities of a devil fruit user...

name: Brook
text: the salt which has the sea's power undoes the bond between the false soul and the corpse.

name: Franky
text: I see.

name: Franky
text: So that thing that flew out of the monkey's mouth a little while ago was the shadow from within his body.

name: Robin
text: To think they had such a weakness...

name: Brook
text: Now then, to defeat the Zombies, simply throw the salt into their mouths!

name: Brook
text: That's the trick!

name: Brook
text: The only trick!

name: Brook
text: The trick!

name: Brook
text: The trick, the trick, the trick!

name: Robin
text: But Brook...

name: Robin
text: Why is it that you happen to know so much about this island and the zombies?

name: Brook
text: When my shadow was stolen five years ago...

name: Brook
text: Naturally, I was cast off in my ship, but luckily enough I woke up in time to find a way back.

name: Brook
text: And then I returned to the island...

name: Brook
text: To fight...

name: Brook
text: The zombie that has my shadow!

name: Brook
text: But... I was completely defeated.

name: Brook
text: I shamefully ran to save my life...

name: Brook
text: No matter what...

name: Brook
text: No matter what... I didn't want to die.

name: Brook
text: Because I was the sole survivor from my ship.

name: Brook
text: Because I promised my friends that one day I'd escape from this Devil Sea...

name: Brook
text: I shamefully ran to save my life!

name: Brook
text: And though I managed to live a long while, I was unable to achieve any resolution.

name: Brook
text: That's why... I will not escape this time!

name: Brook
text: Until I beat that man and recover my shadow I-

name: Brook
text: Well then...

name: Brook
text: Please excuse me, I'll go ahead.

name: Brook
text: Have a good day.

name: Franky
text: Wait a minute!

name: Franky
text: While we're still at it, just answer me one more question.

name: Usopp
text: L-Luffy!

name: Nami
text: What was that... just now?

name: Chopper
text: His shadow...!

name: Chopper
text: His shadow was ripped off!

name: Usopp
text: It's just like the story that skeleton Brook told us.

name: Nami
text: If his shadow was taken... then that means this guy also took Brook's!

name: Chopper
text: I can't believe it...

name: Chopper
text: How come he can do such a thing?

name: Perona
text: Kumashi! You were blabbering again weren't you?!

name: Absalom
text: You're too strict with Kumashi...

name: Absalom
text: Way too strict.

name: Moria
text: This guy will bring me one step closer to being the Pirate King, right Hogback?

name: Hogback
text: Since the day I met you ten years ago, I've served you for the day Number 900 would be made.

name: Hogback
text: With that shadow we can create the greatest zombie ever made...

name: Hogback
text: And without a doubt, it'll become a huge source of power for us!

name: Absalom
text: The day that I will be known worldwide as the Graveyard King has come closer!

name: Perona
text: My dream kingdom where all the world's cute things will become zombies and serve me is before my eyes!

name: Moria
text: Even the most insolent bastard will become an obedient zombie if I take his shadow!

name: Moria
text: I'll turn this world into one full of obedient zombies!

name: Moria
text: If I had a servant like this back then...

name: Moria
text: I wouldn't have lost to that idiot Kaidou in the New World!

name: Moria
text: Let's wake him up already!

name: Moria
text: Gyoro!

name: Moria
text: Nin!

name: Moria
text: Bao!

name: Zombies
text: Yes, master!

name: Moria
text: Open the door to the special freezer!

name: Zombies
text: Right away, master!

name: Moria
text: Just you wait, 900.

name: Absalom
text: Spider Mouse.

name: Absalom
text: Dump Straw Hat Luffy's body on his ship.

name: Absalom
text: And don't forget to remove the thread, it'll be troublesome if he dies.

name: Mouse
text: Yes!

name: Mouse
text: Please wait! I have a report!

name: Absalom
text: What is it?

name: Mouse
text: Just now, Commander Spider Monkey Tararan was defeated!

name: Absalom
text: Defeated?

name: Absalom
text: That's not possible, unless his shadow is extracted.

name: Mouse
text: His shadow was extracted!

name: Hogback
text: Absalom...

name: Hogback
text: The only man capable of such a thing, is him!

name: Absalom
text: The Chivalrous Humming Swordsman!

name: Absalom
text: It seems the report Hildon gave me wasn't wrong.

name: Hogback
text: This is terrible!

name: Mouse
text: The Humming One has been freeing lots of shadows!

name: Mouse
text: Before I knew it, there were countless victims!

name: Mouse
text: At this rate, the nightmare from five years ago will be repeated!

name: Hogback
text: Damn... He's the only man who could tell the zombies' weakn-

name: Hogback
text: Huh?

name: Hogback
text: How did he find out-

name: Hogback
text: Cindry-chan, why're you standing in front of me?!

name: Perona
text: I've heard about him but... what is he like?

name: Absalom
text: Perona, you don't know what he looks like?

name: Absalom
text: Then, that's why he wasn't spotted.

name: Absalom
text: Master!

name: Absalom
text: That troublemaker has come once again...

name: Moria
text: Like I care about such a thing, idiot!

name: Moria
text: You take care of it!

name: Absalom
text: H-Hold on!

name: Moria
text: Now, on to the freezer.

name: Mouse
text: Still, the current situation is...

name: Absalom
text: Idiot! Say that in the first place!

name: Absalom
text: In that case, we should be able to contain him.

name: Mouse
text: Yes.

name: Absalom
text: If there's a problem when he wakes up, report it.

name: Absalom
text: Now go ahead and throw Straw Hat out already.

name: Mouse
text: Yes!

name: Mice
text: Heave-ho!

name: Usopp
text: Idiot, don't go out!

name: Usopp
text: It seems being stripped of your shadow won't kill you!

name: Usopp
text: It didn't kill Brook.

name: Usopp
text: We can't go out yet.

name: Usopp
text: We'll wait for our chance!

name: Usopp
text: It seems like they're going to do something with Luffy's shadow.

name: Usopp
text: We need to see what happens to it so we can get it back later!

name: Zombie General
text: Those two are no longer here.

name: Zombie General
text: Where did they go?

name: Zombie General
text: I can't believe they got Tararan.

name: Gigoro
text: Where's the enemy?!

name: Gigoro
text: I'll cut them in an instant!

name: Robin
text: Franky.

name: Franky
text: What do you want?! I'm not crying!

name: Franky
text: Idiot, don't look this way!

name: Robin
text: Why did you ask him... such a question?

name: Franky
text: Shut up! Don't mind me!

name: Franky
text: Dammit! I love that skeleton now!

name: Franky
text: There isn't a guy that good anywhere!

name: Franky
text: Damn!

name: Robin
text: You're right.

name: Ryuuma
text: As I thought, you're not gonna give up by merely kicking you out.

name: Brooke
text: Of course!

name: Ryuuma
text: Don't you know my name?

name: Ryuuma
text: Anyone who hears the name Swordmaster Ryuuma will cower in fear.

name: Brooke
text: Silence!

name: Brooke
text: You're my shadow!

name: Ryuuma
text: There's a big difference between our bodies.

name: Brooke
text: You shall return...

name: Brooke
text: To my feet!

name: Hogback
text: I can't wait!

name: Hogback
text: Back when I saw his corpse in the Ice Country, I couldn't help but tremble.

name: Hogback
text: It takes my breath away to think this repulsive thing rampaged through the seas 500 years ago!

name: Hogback
text: He took the entire island of each country he conquered to expand his own territory...

name: Hogback
text: Cold...!

name: Hogback
text: And thus he built the so called Evil Country.

name: Hogback
text: The very founder of the Country-Puller legend is right there!

name: Hogback
text: This will be the best zombie ever create-!

name: Moria
text: The legend will be reborn once again!

name: Moria
text: Now... it's time to resurrect...!

name: Moria
text: The only man in history...!

name: Moria
text: The wild warrior that was called the Demon!

name: Moria
text: Oars!
